Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"}

resp = requests.get\("https://www.lesaffairesbf.com/category/appels-doffres/", headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, "html.parser"\)

# Trouver le parent commun des h2
h2 = soup.select\("h2 a"\)[0]
parent = h2.parent  # h2
gp = parent.parent  # conteneur direct
ggp = gp.parent

print\("h2 parent tag:", gp.name, "| classes:", gp.get\("class"\)\)
print\("h2 grandparent tag:", ggp.name, "| classes:", ggp.get\("class"\)\)

# Afficher le bloc HTML du grand-parent \(une entrée complète\)
print\("\\n--- Bloc complet d'une entrée ---"\)
print\(str\(ggp\)[:1000]\)
EOF)

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"}

resp = requests.get\("https://www.lesaffairesbf.com/category/appels-doffres/", headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)

# Filtrer ceux qui ont newest-posts-text
entries = [li for li in lis if li.select_one\(".newest-posts-text"\)]
print\(f"Entrées trouvées : {len\(entries\)}"\)

# Afficher une entrée complète
print\(str\(entries[0]\)[:1500]\)

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"}

resp = requests.get\("https://www.lesaffairesbf.com/category/appels-doffres/", headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, "html.parser"\)

# Chercher pagination
for sel in [".pagination", ".page-numbers", ".nav-links", "a[href*='/page/']"]:
    els = soup.select\(sel\)
    if els:
        print\(f"Pagination via '{sel}': {len\(els\)} éléments"\)
        for e in els[:3]:
            print\("  ", str\(e\)[:120]\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

# Inspecter les deux pages réelles
pages = {
    "dgcmef": "https://dgcmef.gov.bf/fr/appels-d-offre",
    "arcop":  "https://www.arcop.bf/appels-doffres/",
}

for nom, url in pages.items\(\):
    r = requests.get\(url, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15, allow_redirects=True\)
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"{nom.upper\(\)} | {url}"\)
    print\(f"Status: {r.status_code}  Final: {r.url}"\)
    if r.status_code != 200:
        continue
    soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)
    print\(f"articles:{len\(soup.find_all\('article'\)\)} tables:{len\(soup.find_all\('table'\)\)} h2:{len\(soup.select\('h2'\)\)} li:{len\(soup.find_all\('li'\)\)}"\)

    # Afficher structure du premier article/entrée
    art = soup.find\("article"\)
    if art:
        print\(f"\\n--- Premier <article> ---"\)
        print\(str\(art\)[:800]\)

    # Tableaux
    table = soup.find\("table"\)
    if table:
        print\(f"\\n--- Premier <table> \(3 premières lignes\) ---"\)
        for row in table.select\("tr"\)[:3]:
            print\(str\(row\)[:300]\)

    # Chercher des listes de liens avec dates
    print\(f"\\n--- Liens avec dates \(10 premiers\) ---"\)
    for a in soup.select\("a[href]"\)[:20]:
        txt = a.get_text\(strip=True\)
        if len\(txt\) > 15:
            parent_txt = a.parent.get_text\(" ", strip=True\)[:120] if a.parent else ""
            print\(f"  {txt[:60]} → {a['href'][:70]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

r = requests.get\("https://www.arcop.bf/appels-doffres/", headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)

# Nombre total de lignes
rows = soup.select\("table tr"\)[1:]
print\(f"Lignes tableau ARCOP : {len\(rows\)}"\)

# Pagination ?
for sel in [".pagination", ".page-numbers", "a[href*='page']", ".nav-links", ".wp-pagenavi"]:
    els = soup.select\(sel\)
    if els:
        print\(f"Pagination '{sel}': {[e.get_text\(strip=True\)[:30] for e in els[:3]]}"\)

# Y a-t-il des dates dans la page ?
import re
texte_complet = soup.get_text\(\)
dates = re.findall\(r'\\d{1,2}\\s+\(?:janvier|février|mars|avril|mai|juin|juillet|août|septembre|octobre|novembre|décembre\)\\s+\\d{4}', texte_complet, re.IGNORECASE\)
print\(f"\\nDates trouvées dans la page : {dates[:10]}"\)

# Liens de catégorie ou sous-pages ?
links_appels = [a for a in soup.select\("a[href]"\) if "arcop" in a.get\("href",""\) and len\(a.get_text\(strip=True\)\) > 10]
print\(f"\\nLiens ARCOP interne \({len\(links_appels\)}\):"\)
for a in links_appels[:10]:
    print\(f"  {a.get_text\(strip=True\)[:60]} → {a['href'][:80]}"\)
EOF)

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

r = requests.get\("https://www.arcop.bf/appels-doffres/", headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)

# URL exacte de la page 2
pagenavi = soup.select_one\(".wp-pagenavi"\)
print\("wp-pagenavi HTML:", str\(pagenavi\)[:400]\)

# Tester la page 2
import time
time.sleep\(1\)
paged2_urls = [
    "https://www.arcop.bf/appels-doffres/page/2/",
    "https://www.arcop.bf/appels-doffres/?paged=2",
]
for url in paged2_urls:
    r2 = requests.get\(url, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15, allow_redirects=True\)
    print\(f"\\n{url} → {r2.status_code}  Final: {r2.url}"\)
    if r2.status_code == 200:
        soup2 = BeautifulSoup\(r2.text, "html.parser"\)
        rows = soup2.select\("table tr"\)[1:]
        print\(f"  Lignes: {len\(rows\)}"\)
        if rows:
            first_title = rows[0].select_one\("div#doc-title"\)
            print\(f"  1er titre: {first_title.get_text\(strip=True\)[:70] if first_title else 'N/A'}"\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

r = requests.get\("https://www.joffres.net/", headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)

# Chercher tous les liens de navigation/catégories qui ressemblent à des offres
all_links = [\(a.get_text\(strip=True\), a.get\('href',''\)\) for a in soup.select\('a[href]'\) if a.get_text\(strip=True\)]
# Filtrer liens pertinents \(appel, offre, march, avis, tender, categ, pays\)
import re
keywords = ['appel', 'offre', 'march', 'avis', 'tender', 'categor', 'pays', 'burkina', 'search', 'result', 'liste']
for txt, href in all_links:
    if any\(k in \(txt + href\).lower\(\) for k in keywords\):
        print\(f"  {txt[:55]:<55} → {href[:80]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests, time
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

# --- joffres.net : inspecter le contenu de la page filtre déjà récupérée + page publics séparément
url = "https://www.joffres.net/les_appeloffre/filtre"
r = requests.get\(url, headers=HEADERS, timeout=20\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)
print\("=== joffres.net/filtre ==="\)
print\(f"  li: {len\(soup.select\('li'\)\)}"\)
rows_divs = soup.select\('.row'\)
for rd in rows_divs[:3]: print\("  .row:", str\(rd\)[:300]\)
print\("\\n  H1:", soup.select_one\('h1'\).get_text\(strip=True\)[:80] if soup.select_one\('h1'\) else "N/A"\)

# Tous les divs avec des classes intéressantes
interesting = soup.find_all\(True, class_=True\)
class_counts = {}
for el in interesting:
    for c in \(el.get\('class'\) or []\):
        class_counts[c] = class_counts.get\(c,0\)+1
top = sorted\(class_counts.items\(\), key=lambda x:-x[1]\)[:20]
print\("  Top classes:", top\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

r = requests.get\("https://www.joffres.net/les_appeloffre/filtre", headers=HEADERS, timeout=20\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)

# Sélecteurs clés identifiés : .job, .job-title, .expire-date, .offre-localisation
jobs = soup.select\('.job'\)
print\(f"Offres \(.job\): {len\(jobs\)}"\)
if jobs:
    print\("\\n=== Premier .job complet ==="\)
    print\(str\(jobs[0]\)[:1200]\)
    print\("\\n=== Champs extraits ==="\)
    for j in jobs[:3]:
        titre = j.select_one\('.job-title a, h3 a, h2 a'\)
        lien  = titre.get\('href',''\) if titre else ''
        date_exp = j.select_one\('.expire-date, .text-danger'\)
        localisation = j.select_one\('.offre-localisation, .location-and-date'\)
        societe = j.select_one\('.societe, .fa-building'\)
        tag = j.select_one\('.tag'\)
        print\(f"  Titre: {titre.get_text\(strip=True\)[:60] if titre else 'N/A'}"\)
        print\(f"  Lien : {lien[:70]}"\)
        print\(f"  Date : {date_exp.get_text\(strip=True\)[:40] if date_exp else 'N/A'}"\)
        print\(f"  Lieu : {localisation.get_text\(strip=True\)[:40] if localisation else 'N/A'}"\)
        print\(f"  Org  : {societe.parent.get_text\(strip=True\)[:40] if societe else 'N/A'}"\)
        print\(f"  Tag  : {tag.get_text\(strip=True\)[:40] if tag else 'N/A'}"\)
        print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "Accept-Language": "fr-FR,fr;q=0.9"}

r = requests.get\("https://www.joffres.net/les_appeloffre/filtre", headers=HEADERS, timeout=20\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, "html.parser"\)

# Chercher pagination
for sel in ['nav', '.pagination', 'ul.pagination', 'a[rel=next]', 'a[href*=page]', 'a[href*=filtre]']:
    els = soup.select\(sel\)
    if els:
        print\(f"'{sel}': {len\(els\)}"\)
        for e in els[:2]: print\(f"  → {str\(e\)[:120]}"\)

# Tester page 2
import time; time.sleep\(1\)
for url in ["https://www.joffres.net/les_appeloffre/filtre?page=2",
            "https://www.joffres.net/les_appeloffre/filtre/2",
            "https://www.joffres.net/appel-offres-publics?page=2"]:
    r2 = requests.get\(url, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
    jobs = BeautifulSoup\(r2.text, "html.parser"\).select\('.job'\)
    print\(f"{url.split\('net'\)[1]} → {r2.status_code} | jobs: {len\(jobs\)}"\)
EOF)

time.sleep\(2\)

print\("\\n[3/3] PNUD Burkina Faso..."\)
pnud = scraper_pnud\(\)
print\(f"  → {len\(pnud\)} offre\(s\)"\)
for o in pnud:
    print\(f"    • {o['titre'][:60]}"\)
    print\(f"      Secteur: {o['secteur'][:35]}  Limite: {o['date_limite']}  Pub: {o['date_pub']}"\)

print\(f"  dgcmef       : {len\(dgcmef\):>3}"\)

print\(f"  TOTAL        : {len\(joffres\)+len\(dgcmef\)+len\(pnud\):>3}"\)

EOF)
